basic_details.job_title: HLL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Junior Technical Associate and Junior IT Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare (HLL) Junior Technical Associate (Natural Products) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of HLL Lifecare (HLL). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the HLL Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Junior Technical Associate (Natural Products) and Junior IT Engineer.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years for all posts. SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates will be eligible for age and other relaxations as per Government of India guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Chemistry) with 60% mark, 3 years Diploma in Electronics/Computer Hardware Maintenance / Computer Science / Computer Engineering
qualification.details: Junior Technical Associate (Natural Products): M.Sc. (Chemistry) with 60% mark. Junior IT Engineer: 3 years Diploma in Electronics/Computer Hardware Maintenance / Computer Science / Computer Engineering.

selection_process: Certificate Verification Skill Test Written Test

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for HLL Lifecare recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in selection date for the HLL Lifecare recruitment is 16 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Technical Associate post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Technical Associate (Natural Products) post, candidates need an M.Sc. in Chemistry with at least 60% marks. For the Junior IT Engineer post, a 3-year Diploma in Electronics, Computer Hardware Maintenance, Computer Science, or Computer Engineering is required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this HLL Lifecare recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 37 years. Age relaxations will be applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these contract positions ranges from Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 20,000 per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for HLL Lifecare recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Certificate Verification, a Skill Test, and a Written Test. Candidates must clear each stage to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the HLL office in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, with the pincode 695017. Specific timings will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contract-based. Candidates will be hired on a contractual basis by HLL Lifecare.

faq.question: Q10. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by HLL Lifecare for the Junior Technical Associate (Natural Products) and Junior IT Engineer posts.
